mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADM_TEMPLATE_TENANT_MAP (TEMPLATE_NAME, TENANT_ID, SUBJECT) VALUES (#{templateName}, #{tenantId}, #{subject}) ON CONFLICT (TEMPLATE_NAME, TENANT_ID) DO UPDATE SET SUBJECT = EXCLUDED.SUBJECT
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ADM_TEMPLATE_TENANT_MAP WHERE TEMPLATE_NAME = #{templateName} AND TENANT_ID = #{tenantId}
mapper.select: SELECT TENANT_ID FROM ADM_TEMPLATE_TENANT_MAP WHERE TEMPLATE_NAME = #{templateName} ORDER BY CREATED_AT
SELECT TEMPLATE_NAME FROM ADM_TEMPLATE_TENANT_MAP WHERE TENANT_ID = #{tenantId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT
SELECT TEMPLATE_NAME AS templatename, TENANT_ID AS tenantid, SUBJECT AS subject FROM ADM_TEMPLATE_TENANT_MAP ORDER BY TEMPLATE_NAME, TENANT_ID
SELECT SUBJECT FROM ADM_TEMPLATE_TENANT_MAP WHERE TEMPLATE_NAME = #{templateName} LIMIT 1
